title: Price's - Chef's Tealights - 10 Pack - Odour Eliminating Tealights - Made with Basil, Patchouli and Geranium Extracts - Clean, Fresh, Quality Fragrance - Long Lasting Scent
features: CHEF'S TEALIGHTS - Our chef's tealights are made with extracts of basil, patchouli and geranium which are designed to immediately start work to rid your home of unwanted cooking odours, leaving a clean, fresh fragrance! Our tealights are available in a pack of 10.
description: Product Description 1 Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children and pets. Do not leave burning unattended. Use in a well-ventilated area away from any flammable material. Extinguish the candle when leaving the room or before falling asleep. Never let a candle burn to the end. Remove any remaining wax after the candle is off.
